subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-08
subcodes.first_line: Verily, man and woman must in truth be companions, consoling one another, and their concord must be founded upon reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: زن و مرد باید فی الحقیقه رفیق باشند غمخوار یکدیگر باشند موافقنشان از روی حقیقت باشد
subcodes.subjects: @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @equality of men and women, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @idle fancies; lust and passion
